qa_pairs.question: What should users ensure when configuring their Ansys scripts for optimal performance?
qa_pairs.answer: Users should ensure that the optimal number of cores and the minimum amount of memory are specified in their Ansys scripts.

qa_pairs.question: Between single node (SMP) and multinode (DIS) scripts, which typically performs better for Ansys jobs?
qa_pairs.answer: The single node (SMP Shared Memory Parallel) scripts will typically perform better than the multinode (DIS Distributed Memory Parallel) scripts.

qa_pairs.question: When should single node (SMP) scripts be utilized for Ansys simulations?
qa_pairs.answer: Single node (SMP Shared Memory Parallel) scripts should be used whenever possible because they typically offer better performance.

qa_pairs.question: What is recommended to prevent compatibility issues with Ansys input files?
qa_pairs.answer: To help avoid compatibility issues, the Ansys module loaded in your script should ideally match the version used to generate the input file.
